task: Local Permits & Licenses — municipal bible structure (city/county)
disclaimer: Municipal permit and license intelligence compiled from cited public sources — informational only; not legal, zoning, or tax advice. Confirm fees, timelines, and applicability with the cited city/county authority before filing.

domains.title: Business License / Registration
domains.purpose: City business privilege license, tax registration, or mercantile permit required to operate a commercial establishment within municipal limits.

expected_datums.label: Who must register (physical nexus, home-based, contractors)

domains.gap_policy: Fee tables behind login or PDF-only → NOT FOUND with PDF URL as source_checked; state-level registration does not replace municipal license.

domains.title: Zoning / Land Use
domains.purpose: Permitted uses, conditional uses, special exceptions, and zoning clearance before occupancy or change of use.
domains.gap_policy: Cities without traditional zoning (e.g. Houston) → EXEMPT or REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION with deed-restriction / plat note; never assume state zoning replaces local.

domains.title: Signage Permits
domains.purpose: Permanent, temporary, illuminated, and facade signage permits; often split between planning and building departments.
domains.gap_policy: Sign code in municipal code PDF without extractable HTML → cite code URL + NOT FOUND for fee table if absent.

domains.title: Health / Fire / Occupancy
domains.purpose: Certificate of occupancy, fire inspection, health permit (food), assembly occupancy — local enforcement before opening.

expected_datums.label: Food / health establishment permit portal (if applicable)
Fire inspection or assembly permit trigger

domains.gap_policy: County health department overlay (e.g. LA County vs City of LA) → REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION + explicit jurisdiction split in gaps.

domains.title: Home Occupation / Home-Based Business
domains.purpose: Accessory home business rules — zoning clearance, license type, signage prohibition, employee/traffic limits.

expected_datums.label: Home occupation permit or registration path
Zoning code section or policy page

domains.gap_policy: No home-occupation ordinance published → NOT FOUND — [source checked: planning portal + municipal code index].

acceptance_criteria: Every city pack includes all five domain_id sections
Every cited_fact carries full STD-CITE-001 citation tuple
Every gap uses NOT FOUND or REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION with source_checked
Municipal .gov primary; state portals only as routing pointers
HTTP 403/404 → PARKED on source_register without bypass
No mirror paths — single pinned output per city_slug
